jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Restaurant Partners Consulting Pvt Ltd!
